title: West Bengal Class 10 Result 2026: Madhyamik Marksheet On May 8, Check Timing, Passing Marks Here
description: WBBSE Madhyamik 10th Result 2026: To clear the West Bengal Class 10 board examination, students must secure at least 34 per cent overall, which is 272 out of 800 marks. Check official websites to download marksheet, result timing here.
